modmenu.descriptionTranslation.copycoord: CopyCoords IZ CLIENT-SIDE FABRIC MOD DAT MAKEZ COORDZ FASTR TO COPI, CONVERT, AN SHARE.
option.copycoords.copyToClipboard@Toolti: IF DIS IZ ON, /copycoords COPIEZ UR COORDZ TO TEH SYSTEM CLIPBORD AFTER SENDING TEH CHAT MESAGE.
option.copycoords.copyConvertedToClipboa: IF DIS IZ ON, /convertcoords COPIEZ UR CONVERTD COORDZ TO TEH CLIPBORD.
option.copycoords.showDimensionInCoordin: IF DIS IZ ON, TEH DIMENSHUN (OVERWORLD, NETHER, END) WILL SHOW WEN U COPI COORDZ.
option.copycoords.coordinateFormat@Toolt: PICK HOW COORDZ LOOK: SPAC (100 64 200), BRAKET ([100, 64, 200]), OR XYZ (X:100 Y:64 Z:200).
option.copycoords.coordinateTemplate@Too: TYPE UR OWN CUSTOM COORD FORMAT. PLACEHOLDRZ: {x}, {y}, {z}, {dimension}, {dimName}. LEEV EMPTY TO USE TEH FORMAT ABOVE. PREVIEW SHOWZ WEN U EDIT.
option.copycoords.pasteToChatInput@Toolt: IF DIS IZ ON, COPIED COORDZ GET PUT INTO TEH CHAT INPUT BOX INSTEAD OF BEING SENT OR COPIED.
option.copycoords.instantChatEnabled@Too: IF DIS IZ ON, /cc AN /copycoords ALSO SEND THEIR COORD OUTPUT TO SERVER CHAT.
option.copycoords.showInstantChatSendUnb: IF DIS IZ ON, SHOWZ A ONE-TIEM CHAT HINT WEN INSTANT CHAT SEND HAZ NO KEYBIND.
option.copycoords.chatCoordinateDetectio: IF DIS IZ ON, CopyCoords SCANZ INCOMING CHAT MESAGEZ FOR COORD TRIPLEZ AN SHOWZ A FOLLOW-UP ACTION LINE.
MAX DETECTD COORD SETZ PER MESAGE
LIMITZ HOW MANY DETECTD COORD ACTION LINEZ CopyCoords SHOWZ FOR ONE INCOMING MESAGE.
message.copycoords.command.no_player: CANT READ POSITION - NO PLAYER LOADED, OH NOES.
message.copycoords.command.copy_failed: FAILD TO COPI COORDZ TO CLIPBORD: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.copied_with_d: COPIED COORDZ WIF DIMENSHUN TO CLIPBORD: %s
message.copycoords.keybind.failed: FAILD TO COPI COORDZ TO CLIPBORD: %s
message.copycoords.instant_chat_send_unb: [CopyCoords] INSTANT CHAT SEND HAZ NO KEYBIND. GO BIND IT IN CONTROLZ.
message.copycoords.command.unknown_goal: UNKNOWWN GOAL DIMENSHUN: %s (USE overworld OR nether)
message.copycoords.command.unsupported_d: CANT CONVERT COORDZ IN DIS DIMENSHUN (ONLY OVERWORLD AN NETHER R SUPPORTED).
